# GembaBlockchain — full reference

> Bulgaria's first blockchain. A public, decentralized, permissionless Proof-of-Stake Layer 1
> built on Cosmos SDK + the Cosmos EVM module on CometBFT consensus, with full EVM
> compatibility. Native utility coin Gemba (GMB). Built by GEMBA EOOD (Varna, Bulgaria) for
> the good of society — for public institutions and private organizations to deliver services
> to their citizens and users. Value comes from use, not speculation.

## What it is
- A sovereign, permissionless PoS L1 (CometBFT BFT consensus, instant finality, no reorgs).
- Full EVM: Solidity contracts, 0x addresses, MetaMask, Foundry/Hardhat, ethers/viem, JSON-RPC.
- Native coin Gemba (GMB) is the staking + gas coin and a utility coin (cheaper service access,
  workplace access control, event tickets, employee perks).

## Tokenomics
- Fixed total supply 100,000,000 GMB, minted once at genesis, never again → 0% inflation.
- Validator rewards come from a pre-minted reserve, not new issuance.
- The project provides NO liquidity for GMB, operates NO exchange/DEX, and does not redeem GMB
  for fiat — by design. It is not built for trading. (A third party could create a market on a
  permissionless chain; that is outside the project's control.)

## Consensus & decentralization
- Permissionless stake-only validator entry (no KYC, no whitelist). Active set ranked by stake.
- Reserves never vote; the founder holds no privileged voting/validating power.
- "Permissionless by rule, centralizing over time" — published decentralization KPIs.

## Network parameters
- Mainnet: Cosmos chain-id gemba-1, EVM chainId 821206 (not yet launched).
- Testnet: Cosmos chain-id gemba-testnet-1, EVM chainId 821207 — LIVE.
- Block time ~5 seconds. Native symbol GMB, 18 decimals, eth_secp256k1 / coin type 60.

## Live testnet endpoints
- Explorer (GembaScan, Blockscout): https://testnet.gembascan.io
- Public EVM JSON-RPC (redundant, chainId 821207):
  - https://rpc1.gembascan.io
  - https://rpc2.gembascan.io
  - https://rpc3.gembascan.io
- DEX (GembaSwap, Uniswap-V2 style): https://swap.gembachain.io
- Official addresses (all important contracts + genesis reserves, testnet+mainnet): https://addresses.gembachain.io
- Add to MetaMask: RPC any of the above, Chain ID 821207, Currency GMB, Explorer https://testnet.gembascan.io

## Public registry listings (testnet, chainId 821207)
- ethereum-lists/chains (merged PR #8413, https://github.com/ethereum-lists/chains/pull/8413) — the canonical registry of EVM networks that powers chainlist.org. Being listed means wallets and developer tooling recognize the network and users can add it to MetaMask in one click from chainlist.org (the GMB icon is also served from this registry).
- blockscout/chainscout (merged PR #241, https://github.com/blockscout/chainscout/pull/241) — Blockscout's public directory of chains; lists the GembaScan testnet explorer.
- Accuracy: these are TESTNET listings (chainId 821207). Mainnet (chainId 821206) is not yet launched and will get its own registry entries when its RPC/explorer are live.

## Ecosystem apps
- GembaScan — block explorer.
- GembaSwap — token swap DEX.
- GembaPass — workplace access-control SaaS (passes as soulbound NFTs; blockchain invisible to users).
- EduChain — gamified Web3 education sandbox running on the testnet.
- GembaEscrow, GembaWin, GembaTools — services payable in GMB at a 20% discount (see below).
- GembaTicket — event ticketing; GMB discount applies only to the event-creation fee.
- GembaKitchen, GembaSniperBot — GMB discount prepared, activating with mainnet GMB.

## GMB — what it's for & the 20% discount
- Official GMB info page: https://gmb.gembachain.io — what GMB is, what it can and cannot be used for, how to get it, how to earn it as a validator.
- Purpose of GMB: pay 20% less for Gemba ecosystem services when paying in GMB. The discount is a uniform 20%, computed at the fixed internal rate 1 GMB = €1. This rate is for fee-accounting only — GMB has NO market price, NO buyback and NO fiat redemption.
- dApps with the GMB discount: GembaEscrow, GembaWin, GembaTools (live on testnet, 20% off the service fee); GembaTicket (20% off ONLY the event-creation fee, NOT ticket purchases); GembaKitchen and GembaSniperBot (prepared, activating with mainnet GMB).
- What you CAN do with GMB: pay for those services at 20% off; pay network gas; stake to run or delegate to a validator; freely transfer or gift it. What you CANNOT do: sell it back to the project, redeem it for fiat, or treat it as an investment.
- Becoming a validator: bond GMB, run a node, join the active set (no KYC). Active validators earn protocol rewards from the pre-minted 20M reserve (zero inflation; reward = max(10, min(100, stake×1%)) GMB/day; minimum self-bond 1,000 GMB). Those rewards are utility credit to spend on-chain — on Gemba services at 20% off, on gas, on deploying contracts, on transactions — not a financial return or passive-income scheme.
- Tip: gas is a fraction of a cent and the testnet faucet gives 0.1 GMB/24h, so you never need to overbuy GMB just to cover gas — acquire only what the service costs (e.g. a €10 service = 8 GMB with the 20% discount).

## Who
- Built by GEMBA EOOD (https://gembait.com), a Bulgarian technology company in Varna.
- Source code: https://github.com/ivanovslavy/GembaBlockchain (Apache-2.0).

## Testnet faucet & test stablecoins
- Public faucet (chainId 821207): contract 0x0147581e2351dD182edD651DFEfD955CB353f8aA. One combo faucet dispenses both native GMB and the test stablecoins. Free testnet assets per wallet every 24h: 0.1 GMB and 10,000 of each test stablecoin. Claim on the official site (https://gembachain.io/#faucet) or in the dApps (https://win.gembait.com/en/faucet , https://escrow.gembait.com/en/faucet).
- Test stablecoins (6 decimals, valueless test tokens, NOT real): USDT 0xF61647866ad7be8137230Ad688092D2f3F4A1666, USDC 0xc9af98AD8ae78086620821F9Ceb05842Dd7950CF, EURC 0x7Ff43282d7939418a3f0A308E2d48Dd93536044e.
- dApps accepting native GMB + these stablecoins: GembaWin (on-chain bounty/reward contests, https://win.gembait.com) and GembaEscrow (smart-contract escrow, https://escrow.gembait.com).
- Buy GMB: with card or crypto via the GembaPay service — enter an EVM address + amount at https://gembachain.io/#buy and GMB is delivered automatically once payment is confirmed (testnet GMB is valueless; same flow on mainnet). Contact: https://gembachain.io/#contact . Legal: https://gembachain.io/terms/ and https://gembachain.io/privacy/ .
